note: jquery_ui_tabs is a passive asset/library provider (no config UI, no permissions, no services, no PHP of its own — the tabs library is declared by the base jquery_ui module's hook_library_info_alter). All cases are `recipe` (response-graded), not `execution` (live-state). Facts are grounded in data.json, usage.md, and agent/theming/jquery_ui_tabs.md.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site, why would I install the contrib `jquery_ui_tabs` module? What does it provide?
evals.expected_output: It re-provides the jQuery UI Tabs widget as an asset library after jQuery UI was deprecated and removed from Drupal core, so existing themes/modules that render tabs keep working. It is not a feature/config module.

evals.prompt: What is the exact library id I attach to get the jQuery UI Tabs widget from the jquery_ui_tabs module?
In a Drupal 11 render array I need the jQuery UI Tabs widget. Give the exact `#attached` line to attach it.
Does jquery_ui_tabs work on its own, or does it need another module? Where does its library definition actually come from?
evals.expected_output: It depends on the base jquery_ui module (jquery_ui:jquery_ui >=8.x-1.7). jquery_ui_tabs ships no *.libraries.yml itself; the base jquery_ui module declares the `tabs` library on its behalf via hook_library_info_alter() reading jquery_ui.libraries.data.json.

evals.prompt: In my own module's *.libraries.yml, how do I make my JS library depend on the jQuery UI tabs widget? Show the YAML.
Where is the configuration/settings page for the jquery_ui_tabs module, and what permissions does it add?
evals.expected_output: There is none: jquery_ui_tabs has no configuration UI, no permissions and no services. You install it, attach jquery_ui_tabs/tabs, and initialize .tabs() in your own JS.

evals.prompt: My legacy code relied on the jQuery UI tabs widget from core (core/jquery.ui) and now it's gone. What do I install and reference instead?
evals.expected_output: Install the jquery_ui_tabs contrib module and reference the jquery_ui_tabs/tabs library instead of the removed core jQuery UI tabs assets.

evals.prompt: After attaching jquery_ui_tabs/tabs, does it automatically turn my markup into tabs?
evals.expected_output: No. The library only loads the widget assets (tabs-min.js and tabs.css). You still call .tabs() on your element from your own JavaScript, typically inside a Drupal.behaviors attach.
